fields.calculatedFormula:
IF(TOP_DKL__c = 0, 1, TOP_DKL__c) *
IF(ContractPrice_DKL__c = 0, 1, ContractPrice_DKL__c) *
IF(ContractDaysYear_DKL__c = 0, 1, ContractDaysYear_DKL__c) *
VALUE(BLANKVALUE(ContractDuration_DKL__c,'1'))

fields.label: Product

fields.label: Production Capacity(TPD)
